name: Buttermilk Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Seven Seas Buttermilk Salad Dressing
1/4 teaspoon hot sauce, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the salad dressing, egg, and hot sauce; blend well.
2. Dip the chicken wings into the dressing mixture (leaving them whole and tucking the tip under the meaty part), and roll in breadcrumbs.
3. Place the wings in a lightly greased baking pan (a jellyroll pan works well).
4. Bake at 400°F for 40 minutes.
5. Serve warm or at room temperature.
